summary: First-finish smoke tests for Spotlight Awards Guidebook. Backend endpoints, JWT auth, admin CRUD, and all key frontend pages verified. Admin add/delete winner flow works end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/auth/login with cochair@theblueprint.com/Blueprint2026! returns access_token + admin user
GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token and admin user with Bearer token
POST /api/winners returns 401 without token, 200 with admin token
PUT and DELETE /api/winners/{id} return 200 with admin token
Frontend Home, Winners, Themes, Timelines, Nomination, Rubric, Tracking pages load successfully
Login page authenticates and redirects to /admin
Admin panel: adding a new winner and deleting it works end-to-end (verified via UI toast + API + delete button click)

failed.issue: Themes objects use key 'faq' (singular) but review request mentions 'FAQ arrays'/'faqs'. Frontend Themes page reads content correctly (renders 2025/2026 tabs).

action_items: None blocking. Optionally verify FAQ array shape/naming ('faq' vs 'faqs') matches frontend Themes accordion expectations if any FAQs need to render.
